chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer Appln. No. S – 46 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 21.05.2024 Mr. Nadir Ali G. Chachar, Advocate for applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed.
